description_long: This is a sleek, modern record player with a glossy black rectangular base and four sturdy feet. The turntable platter is prominently featured at the center, adorned with a bold, circular graphic in red, white, and beige, and surrounded by a metallic, textured rim. The tonearm is positioned to the right, with a visible pivot and headshell, and appears to be made of metal with a black finish. Several control buttons and knobs are located on the top surface, including a large white button, a red knob, and smaller white and black switches, all arranged for easy access. The surface is highly reflective, giving the device a polished, high-end appearance. No dust cover is present, leaving the platter and tonearm fully exposed.
description: A glossy black record player with a bold graphic platter, metallic accents, and visible control knobs and tonearm. The design is modern and highly reflective, with no dust cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full platter graphic, tonearm to the right, and control buttons on the left and right edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tonearm assembly and the arrangement of control knobs along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tonearm on the left, platter graphic visible, and control buttons more prominent on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tonearm base and the large white button on the left edge.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and centrally located, featuring a large, circular design with a bold red, white, and beige graphic. The platter has a metallic, textured rim and appears to be made of metal with a glossy finish. It occupies a significant portion of the device's top surface and is visually distinguished by its graphic and reflective qualities.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, extending from the right side of the device. It is straight, medium in length, and made of metal with a black finish. The tonearm is resting in its holder, with visible joints and a headshell at the end, positioned above the platter.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible, attached to the end of the tonearm. It is small, pointed, and appears to be made of metal and plastic, distinct as a separate component at the headshell.
attribute_control_knobs: Multiple control knobs and buttons are present, including a large white button, a red knob, and several smaller white and black switches. These are located on the top surface, primarily along the left and right edges, and are made of plastic with a glossy finish. No visible labels or markings are present.
